prompt: A darkly comedic, cinematic product advertisement staged in a messy modern living room at night. In the background, a person in a full Spider-Man-inspired red and blue suit lies face-down and motionless on a wooden floor, one arm stretched toward the camera, posed like a defeated superhero after a battle. The room is dim and moody with a gray couch in soft focus, pillows and blankets tossed around, and scattered white popcorn across the floor. In the left foreground, show 1 open pizza box cropped into frame. In the right foreground, place 1 large upright can of Raid insect spray as the hero object, sharply focused, oversized in perspective, with a black cap and a purple label facing camera. Make the product feel dominant, clean, and commercial, with dramatic rim lighting and glossy reflections. Add 2 lines of bold white uppercase ad copy: at the top, very large condensed sans-serif text reading NOT EVEN A SUPERHERO SURVIVES.; at the bottom center, smaller bold text reading Raid. Kills bugs dead.. Include 2 visible insect illustrations on the can label, and keep the overall tone like a high-end shock-value commercial campaign: realistic photography, shallow depth of field, strong contrast, gritty floor texture, subdued gray-blue interior lighting, and a composition that makes the spray can the clear focal point while the fallen hero tells the joke in the background.
